recommendations.title: Kill Switch
recommendations.overview: A troubled and violent detective investigates a series of serial killer murders in Memphis, Tennessee.

recommendations.title: Firebrand
recommendations.overview: Katherine Parr, the sixth wife of King Henry VIII, is named regent while the tyrant battles abroad. When the king returns, increasingly ill and paranoid, Katherine finds herself fighting for her own survival.

recommendations.title: The King and the Mockingbird
recommendations.overview: A young shepherdess and a chimneysweep plan to get married and escape the clutches of a tyrannical king in love with her, assisted by the guile of a cheeky mockingbird, the king's archenemy.

recommendations.title: Distorted
recommendations.overview: A married couple suspect that the 'smart apartments' in their high tech residence are being used by its owner for sinister reasons.

recommendations.title: Driven to Kill
recommendations.overview: A former Russian mobster named Ruslan, who is now a crime novelist, returns home and discovers his daughter is marrying his arch nemesis. His past also comes back to haunt him when his family is threatened. Hungry for justice, Ruslan returns to the l

recommendations.title: Hunting Ava Bravo
recommendations.overview: Billionaire sportsman Buddy King unwinds by hunting human captives on his remote mountain estate. But his latest victim, Ava Bravo, is no easy target.

recommendations.title: He's All That
recommendations.overview: To get revenge on her ex-boyfriend, an influencer attempts to transform an unpopular classmate into prom king.

recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The King's Speech
recommendations.overview: The King's Speech tells the story of the man who became King George VI, the father of Queen Elizabeth II. After his brother abdicates, George ('Bertie') reluctantly assumes the throne. Plagued by a dreaded stutter and considered unfit to be king, Ber

recommendations.title: The Humanity Bureau
recommendations.overview: In 2030 the world is in a permanent state of economic recession and facing serious environmental problems as a result of global warming.
